fields.label: Stage Order
fields.description: Grouping key. Multiple rows sharing the same stage_order + permit_type form a PARALLEL completion group (e.g. Building Permit's DCD+DEWA+RTA NOCs). All rows in a group must complete before the next stage_order unlocks.

fields.label: SLA Value
fields.description: Numeric duration. Pair with sla_unit. Mark estimated/unverified in description if sourced from a single reference.

fields.label: SLA Unit
fields.description: v1 permit types use Days. Minutes/Hours reserved for v2 transactional (Customs channel SLAs).

fields.label: Is Blocking
fields.description: If checked, this stage must complete before advancement. Mirrors StageCondition.blocking_flag at the template level.
